query: Is food included in the base corporate grazing quote?
direct_answer: Porch & Party offers corporate grazing-table styling in Memphis for businesses and hosts who want a stronger presentation for a work event, hosted gathering, or client-facing setup.
best_for: This page is for Memphis-area businesses and organizers who want grazing-table presentation support and need clarity on what styling-only versus food-included requests actually mean.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
